title: Velvety Italian Milk Chocolate Mousse
description: A silky, plant-based Italian milk chocolate mousse that shatters with every spoonful, cooked in a traditional ttukbaegi earthenware pot for a touch of rustic charm.
instructions: Place soy milk in a ttukbaegi earthenware pot and heat gently until warm but not boiling.
Add chopped milk chocolate to the pot and stir until completely melted.
Whisk in caster sugar, cornstarch, and a pinch of sea salt until the mixture is smooth and thick.
Remove the pot from heat and let the chocolate base cool to room temperature.
In a separate bowl, combine chilled coconut cream, vanilla extract, and olive oil; whip until soft peaks form.
Fold the whipped coconut mixture into the cooled chocolate base, mixing until fully integrated.
Spoon the mousse into individual serving glasses or bowls.
Refrigerate the mousse for at least 4 hours until firm.
Just before serving, dust the tops with cacao powder and garnish with a few mint leaves if desired.
